messages.subject: [OGRUG] Ottawa R Helpdesk meetings
messages.body_plain:
(Let's try this again...)

Greetings Ottawa/Gatineau R users,

I'm a biostatistician with a fair bit of experience in R. A friend of
mine asked me to help him with some code, and while we were talking it
over, we decided to invite the general R-using public to come along.
So without further ado, I introduce the Ottawa R Helpdesk
meetup(http://www.meetup.com/R-Helpdesk/), an informal, semi-regular
gathering of (at least two) local R users grappling with the wonders
and vagaries of R.

All the best,
Corey
